criteria.description: The visual hierarchy fits the surface and makes primary content/actions immediately legible.
Components keep stable dimensions and do not overlap, jump, or overflow across responsive states.
Controls have clear affordances, readable labels, and polished hover/focus/disabled states.
Color, contrast, typography, and spacing are balanced rather than one-note or cramped.
Keyboard access, focus visibility, contrast, and non-color state cues are acceptable for a generated artifact.
